content_html:
TZRO: The Local AI Task Offloader

Keep the Cloud for Strategy. Offload the Execution to Local Compute. Slash your agentic API token bills by 90%+.

Traditional coding assistants and CLI agent loops (like Claude Code, Cursor, or VS Code Copilot) are prone to "Token-Maxing." Every time an agent recursively scans your directory, parses an Abstract Syntax Tree (AST), or formats massive datasets, it re-submits raw codebase contexts to expensive cloud APIs. This results in linear cost escalation, reaching $50 to $150 per day in API fees for a single active developer workspace.

TZRO.ai fixes the economics of agentic development. By utilizing the open standard Model Context Protocol (MCP), TZRO sits transparently beneath your favorite coding client. Your cloud frontier model (e.g., Claude 3.5 Sonnet) handles high-level strategy planning exactly once, compiling instructions into an abstract execution graph. It then dynamically delegates all token-heavy file operations, string transformations, and data-shuffling to TZRO's lightweight, hardware-pinned local engine running an optimized local model — at zero marginal cost.

⚡ Quickstart

Run this in your terminal:

curl -fsSL https://get.tzro.ai | sh

The installer detects your platform, builds from source if Go is available (or fetches pre-compiled release binaries), downloads the default GGUF model, and provisions MCP configurations for supported AI editors (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Gemini CLI).

🛠️ Dynamic Client-Side Delegation Architecture

TZRO relies on a strict decoupling of cognitive scheduling and local execution.

                  DYNAMIC CLIENT-SIDE DELEGATION FLOW

   +-----------------------+                    +-----------------------+
   |   MCP Client (Cloud)  |                    |   TZRO Server (Local) |
   |  (e.g., Claude Code)  |                    | (Task Offloader / OS) |
   +-----------------------+                    +-----------------------+
               |                                            |
               | ---- (1) Initialization Handshake -------->|
               | <--- (2) Exposes 15 MCP tools -------------|
               |                                            |
               |   =====================================    |
               |   User requests a token-heavy task:        |
               |   "Document this entire 100MB repository"  |
               |   =====================================    |
               |                                            |
               | ---- (3) Calls "tzro_run" ---------------->| (Delegates execution)
               |          with compiled task steps          |
               |                                            | (Kahn DAG compilation)
               |                                            | (GBNF logit constraints)
               |                                            | (5-Layer Compaction)
               |                                            | (SQLite persistence)
               |                                            |
               | <--- (4) Returns clean Markdown summary ---| (Context footprint < 1KB)
               |                                            |
  • Kahn Graph Engine: The Go engine ingests the client's payload, maps file dependencies via abstract syntax trees (ASTs), and applies Kahn's Topological Sort Algorithm to compile operations into a concurrent, parallelizable Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG).
  • GBNF Logit Constraints: Small local models frequently hallucinate formats. TZRO injects Backus-Naur Form (GBNF) grammars directly into the local model's token decoding logits at execution time, mathematically guaranteeing a 0% syntax failure rate on JSON or structural markdown outputs.
  • 5-Layer Compaction Pipeline: To prevent local context drowning, multi-object responses are structurally stripped of binary footprints, converted into header-mapped Tabular TSV formatting (saving 65% to 85% on raw token counts), and flattened into key-value pairs. If the data still exceeds the context budget, it is moved to an internal disk cache where the local model queries it sequentially via transactional SQLite tables.

For a comprehensive guide on the internal subsystems, compilation flow, neural edge traversal, context compaction pipelines, and the Go SDK hooks, refer to the Architecture Guide.

💎 The Go-Native Advantage vs. Python Frameworks

TZRO.ai avoids the heavy runtime layers and dynamic type errors typical of traditional, research-centric Python frameworks. By building strictly on systems-level Go:

  • Ultra-Low Resource Footprint: Runs at <30MB idle memory and boots in <10ms. It will not spin your fans or drain your battery during heavy processing sweeps.
  • Zero Dependency Management: Compiles entirely into a single, self-contained static binary. No virtual environments, breaking package upgrades, or fragile lockfiles to manage.
  • Type-Safe LLM Generations: Because Go is explicit, rigidly typed, and utilizes clean conventions (if err != nil), LLMs generate 90%+ more stable and execution-ready Go code compared to highly dynamic or deeply abstracted languages.

📈 Real-World Performance & Cost Matrix

Feature Benchmark Python Frameworks TypeScript Frameworks TZRO.ai (Go Core)
Avg Cost per Document Loop $15–$45 (Cloud-dependent) $15–$35 (Cloud-dependent) <$0.20 (99% Token Reduction)
Idle Memory Overhead 150MB+ RAM 80MB+ RAM <30MB RAM (75% Reduction)
Cold-Start Time 200ms–500ms 50ms–100ms <10ms (Instant Startup)
State Durability Model Proprietary Platforms (Paid) Serverless/Cloud Dependent SQLite Checkpoint Tables (Local/Free)
Output Structural Security Post-hoc validation parsing Runtime schema checking Logit-Level GBNF Constraints

🎛️ Dual-Motion Integration: SDK Framework vs. MCP Sidecar

TZRO supports two operational integration workflows:

  • Motion B — The MCP Sidecar: The out-of-the-box local daemon utility used by individual contributors to instantly restrict cloud API billing thresholds within active IDE spaces. Register the MCP server with your coding client and start offloading immediately.
  • Motion A — The SDK Framework: A robust systems framework for engineering architects. When your team scales from personal code execution to creating highly concurrent background enterprise automation pipelines (e.g., continuous CRM synchronizations or database migrations), import the Go-native SDK to deploy lightweight, crash-proof microservices.

🎛️ MCP Server Integration

To integrate tzro as an MCP server with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Gemini CLI, or Google Antigravity:

1. Build the Binary

go build -o bin/tzro-mcp ./cmd/tzro-mcp

2. Register in Client Configuration

Claude Desktop:

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tzro": {
      "command": "/absolute/path/to/tzro/bin/tzro-mcp",
      "args": [],
      "env": { "PORT": "8080" }
    }
  }
}

Cursor: Add a new command type MCP server pointing to /absolute/path/to/tzro/bin/tzro-mcp.

Gemini CLI (~/.gemini/mcp_config.json):

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tzro": {
      "command": "/absolute/path/to/.tzro/bin/tzro-mcp",
      "args": []
    }
  }
}

Google Antigravity: Add the server configuration to .agents/mcp_config.json inside your active workspace, defining necessary environment parameters like TZRO_DIR.

3. Verify via Handshake Test

Run ./bin/tzro-mcp manually and paste this initialization JSON-RPC block:

{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "initialize",
  "params": {
    "protocolVersion": "2024-11-05",
    "capabilities": {},
    "clientInfo": { "name": "test-client", "version": "1.0.0" }
  }
}

4. Safeguard the Stdio Pipe

Standard input and output are strictly reserved for JSON-RPC message framing. All debug logging and runtime warnings are redirected to stderr. Never print to stdout inside custom tools, middleware, or extensions.

For more details, refer to the full MCP Setup Guide.

📡 MCP Tool Interface — 15 Tools

tzro exposes its OS capabilities as a lean set of 15 MCP tools over stdio, organized into three tiers:

Tier 1: Core Execution (High-Frequency)

Tool Purpose
tzro_run Plan, compile, and execute a durable DAG workflow from a natural language prompt
tzro_code Generate or update a single file via local LLM codegen (full or diff mode)
tzro_status Check execution status, node states, and outcomes of a task
tzro_list_tasks List recent tasks, optionally filtered by status
tzro_resume Resume a paused/interrupted workflow task
tzro_workflow Create and execute a pre-defined DAG workflow, bypassing the LLM planner
tzro_restart In-place daemon re-exec restart via syscall.Exec
tzro_dashboard Check dashboard spec status and return the HTTP dashboard URL
tzro_schedule Create, list, toggle, delete, or trigger scheduled cron workflows

Tier 2: Merged Action-Dispatch

Tool Purpose
tzro_hook Manage human-in-the-loop approval hooks (list / approve)
tzro_model Manage local LLM models (list / set)

Tier 3: Generic API Escape Hatch

Tool Purpose
tzro_api Generic dispatch for less-frequent operations: completion, classification, compact, web_search, memory_query, memory_ingest, kg_neighborhood, kg_add_entity, rag_context, skills_list, skills_get, skills_relevant, skills_add, observer_events, observer_memories, activity_report, sentinel_alerts, sentinel_wake, configure_tools, apps_list, apps_install, apps_uninstall, dashboard_regenerate, dashboard_spec — or proxy to daemon HTTP endpoints

Infrastructure: Client Tool Dispatch

These tools support the MCP client-tool protocol and are not typically called directly by users:

Tool Purpose
tzro_register_client_tools Register dynamic client-side tool definitions for the planning engine
tzro_client_tool_list List pending client-side tool execution requests
tzro_client_tool_submit Submit execution outcomes to resume a paused workflow

Resource Subscriptions

For real-time observability, the MCP server exposes two URI templates for push notifications:

  • Task Output: tzro://tasks/{taskId}/output{?format} — Status, metrics, and consolidated output for a task
  • Node Output: tzro://tasks/{taskId}/nodes/{nodeId}/output{?format} — Status and output of a specific node

🆕 v1.0.0 Highlights

  • Structured Content-Aware Compaction Engine — New internal/compactor/ package replaces the older configurable CompactionLevel system. Tool outputs are now compacted using deterministic, content-type-aware strategies: code skeleton extraction (AST/regex-based, never LLM-compressed), JSON pruning, and log/text line truncation. Only the model's own reasoning text is LLM-compressed via the 1B router model. Compaction triggers every 3 steps as an architectural constant.
  • Goal-Directed File Compaction — When probe nodes read large files (>100 lines), the read_file tool automatically compresses output against the probe's goal using the router model. Files ≤100 lines are returned raw. Non-probe callers are unaffected. Falls back to deterministic truncation on router errors.
  • Worker Sidecar Synthesis — Terminal synthesis now routes through WorkerInference (64K context worker model) for superior content generation quality, while the router sidecar handles step-level tool decisions.
  • Default Model Upgrade — Default worker model upgraded to Agents-A1-4B (Q4_K_M quantization) for improved agentic task performance.
  • AST-Based Symbol Extraction & Anchor Verification — Pure-Go tree-sitter integration parses every file read during Probe Thought Chains, building a deterministic Symbol Index across 12 languages. A post-synthesis Anchor Check detects hallucinated type names and triggers targeted corrections, eliminating a 67% hallucination rate observed in docgen benchmarks.
  • Directory Preloading — Probe Nodes pre-load source context (AST-extracted symbols for Go, raw content for Markdown/text) from target directories before exploration begins, eliminating file discovery gaps caused by local model routing failures.
  • Repo Mapping & Direct Synthesis — Deterministic AST-based codebase architecture maps enable single-shot synthesis for tasks that don't require multi-step Probe exploration, bypassing the Thought Chain entirely.
  • .gitignore-Aware Directory Operations — Directory copying operations now respect .gitignore patterns, preventing accidental inclusion of build artifacts and dependency trees.
  • Website v2 — Redesigned documentation site with GitHub integration, interactive architecture cards, and new legal pages (Privacy Policy, Terms of Service).

💻 Guidelines for AI Coding Agents

If you are an AI coding assistant, software agent, or automated bot executing tasks in this repository, you must adhere to the following developer guidelines:

1. Respect the Local Wiki Architecture

All system concept pages, historical bug diagnostic post-mortems, and workflow diagrams are persisted under docs/wiki/. Whenever you complete a feature refactor, diagnose a benchmark failure, or implement a design shift, you must log it chronology-wise in docs/wiki/log.md, create/update the relevant files in docs/wiki/features/ or docs/wiki/bugs/, and update docs/wiki/index.md.

2. Adhere to Domain Nomenclature

Always use standard terminology in code comments, schemas, and UI components. Never use deprecated v1 names. Refer to CONTEXT.md at the repository root for the full glossary list before writing variables or documentation.

3. Verification & Testing Posture

All newly exported Go functions, compilation passes, or tool registrations require corresponding tests in their respective packages. Run tests (go test ./...) and code formatting (go fmt ./...) before proposing changes.

4. Durable Execution Delegation (Offload Policy)

When executing any task that does not explicitly require frontier model reasoning (such as code generation, complex architectural design judgment, or interactive human dialogue), coding agents must delegate execution to the local tzro engine via tzro_run or tzro CLI. Refer to AGENTS.md and the offload policies in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for specific triggers and wait protocols.

🤝 Contributing & Community

We prioritize measurable utility over vanity metrics. Success is tracked by Weekly Active Offloaded Tasks (WAOT) rather than GitHub star accumulation.

We welcome pull requests! Look for these labels on issues to get started:

  • good first issue — Ideal for writing custom structural GBNF grammar templates for corporate data standards.
  • compaction-layer-optimizations — Optimizing the 5-layer text compression pipelines for specialized file types.

⚖️ Development & Testing

Keep the repository formatted, clean, and tested using the standard build environment scripts:

Go Subsystems

# Run all Go unit and integration tests
go test -v ./...

# Format Go source files
go fmt ./...

Vite React Dashboard

# Run ESLint validation
npm --prefix web run lint

# Build production bundle cleanly
npm --prefix web run build

sentences.en: Your cloud frontier model (e.g., Claude 3.5 Sonnet) handles high-level strategy planning exactly once, compiling instructions into an abstract execution graph.
sentences.zh: 您的云前沿模型（例如，Claude 3.5 Sonnet）只处理一次高级策略规划，将指令编译成抽象执行图。

sentences.en: It then dynamically delegates all token-heavy file operations, string transformations, and data-shuffling to TZRO's lightweight, hardware-pinned local engine running an optimized local model — at zero marginal cost.
sentences.zh: 然后，它以零边际成本动态地将所有令牌密集型文件操作、字符串转换和数据洗牌委托给 TZRO 的轻量级、硬件固定的本地引擎，运行优化的本地模型。

sentences.en: The installer detects your platform, builds from source if Go is available (or fetches pre-compiled release binaries), downloads the default GGUF model, and provisions MCP configurations for supported AI editors (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Gemini CLI).

blocks.html_en: 🛠️ Dynamic Client-Side Delegation Architecture

sentences.en: 🛠️ Dynamic Client-Side Delegation Architecture
sentences.zh: 🛠️ 动态客户端委托架构

blocks.html_en: TZRO relies on a strict decoupling of cognitive scheduling and local execution.

sentences.en: TZRO relies on a strict decoupling of cognitive scheduling and local execution.
sentences.zh: TZRO 依赖于认知调度和本地执行的严格解耦。

blocks.html_en: • Kahn Graph Engine: The Go engine ingests the client's payload, maps file dependencies via abstract syntax trees (ASTs), and applies Kahn's Topological Sort Algorithm to compile operations into a concurrent, parallelizable Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG).

sentences.en: Kahn Graph Engine: The Go engine ingests the client's payload, maps file dependencies via abstract syntax trees (ASTs), and applies Kahn's Topological Sort Algorithm to compile operations into a concurrent, parallelizable Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG).
sentences.zh: Kahn 图形引擎：Go 引擎摄取客户端的有效负载，通过抽象语法树 (AST) 映射文件依赖关系，并应用 Kahn 的拓扑排序算法将操作编译为并发、可并行的有向无环图 (DAG)。

blocks.html_en: • GBNF Logit Constraints: Small local models frequently hallucinate formats. TZRO injects Backus-Naur Form (GBNF) grammars directly into the local model's token decoding logits at execution time, mathematically guaranteeing a 0% syntax failure rate on JSON or structural markdown outputs.

sentences.en: GBNF Logit Constraints: Small local models frequently hallucinate formats.
sentences.zh: GBNF Logit 约束：小型局部模型经常会产生幻觉格式。

sentences.en: TZRO injects Backus-Naur Form (GBNF) grammars directly into the local model's token decoding logits at execution time, mathematically guaranteeing a 0% syntax failure rate on JSON or structural markdown outputs.
sentences.zh: TZRO 在执行时将巴科斯-诺尔范式 (GBNF) 语法直接注入本地模型的 token 解码 logits，从数学上保证 JSON 或结构性降价输出的语法失败率为 0%。

blocks.html_en: • 5-Layer Compaction Pipeline: To prevent local context drowning, multi-object responses are structurally stripped of binary footprints, converted into header-mapped Tabular TSV formatting (saving 65% to 85% on raw token counts), and flattened into key-value pairs. If the data still exceeds the context budget, it is moved to an internal disk cache where the local model queries it sequentially via transactional SQLite tables.

sentences.en: 5-Layer Compaction Pipeline: To prevent local context drowning, multi-object responses are structurally stripped of binary footprints, converted into header-mapped Tabular TSV formatting (saving 65% to 85% on raw token counts), and flattened into key-value pairs.
sentences.zh: 5 层压缩管道：为了防止本地上下文淹没，多对象响应在结构上剥离了二进制足迹，转换为标头映射的表格 TSV 格式（原始令牌计数节省 65% 到 85%），并展平为键值对。

sentences.en: If the data still exceeds the context budget, it is moved to an internal disk cache where the local model queries it sequentially via transactional SQLite tables.
sentences.zh: 如果数据仍然超出上下文预算，则会将其移至内部磁盘缓存，本地模型将在其中通过事务 SQLite 表按顺序查询数据。

sentences.en: For a comprehensive guide on the internal subsystems, compilation flow, neural edge traversal, context compaction pipelines, and the Go SDK hooks, refer to the Architecture Guide.
sentences.zh: 有关内部子系统、编译流程、神经边缘遍历、上下文压缩管道和 Go SDK 挂钩的综合指南，请参阅架构指南。

blocks.html_en: TZRO.ai avoids the heavy runtime layers and dynamic type errors typical of traditional, research-centric Python frameworks. By building strictly on systems-level Go:

sentences.en: TZRO.ai avoids the heavy runtime layers and dynamic type errors typical of traditional, research-centric Python frameworks.
sentences.zh: TZRO.ai 避免了传统的、以研究为中心的 Python 框架典型的繁重的运行时层和动态类型错误。

sentences.en: By building strictly on systems-level Go:
sentences.zh: 通过严格在系统级 Go 上构建：

blocks.html_en: • Ultra-Low Resource Footprint: Runs at <30MB idle memory and boots in <10ms. It will not spin your fans or drain your battery during heavy processing sweeps.

sentences.en: Ultra-Low Resource Footprint: Runs at <30MB idle memory and boots in <10ms.
sentences.zh: 超低资源占用：以 <30MB 空闲内存运行，启动时间 <10ms。

sentences.en: It will not spin your fans or drain your battery during heavy processing sweeps.
sentences.zh: 在繁重的处理扫描过程中，它不会旋转风扇或耗尽电池。

blocks.html_en: • Zero Dependency Management: Compiles entirely into a single, self-contained static binary. No virtual environments, breaking package upgrades, or fragile lockfiles to manage.

sentences.en: Zero Dependency Management: Compiles entirely into a single, self-contained static binary.
sentences.zh: 零依赖管理：完全编译成一个独立的静态二进制文件。

sentences.en: No virtual environments, breaking package upgrades, or fragile lockfiles to manage.
sentences.zh: 无需管理虚拟环境、破坏性软件包升级或脆弱的锁定文件。

blocks.html_en: • Type-Safe LLM Generations: Because Go is explicit, rigidly typed, and utilizes clean conventions (if err != nil), LLMs generate 90%+ more stable and execution-ready Go code compared to highly dynamic or deeply abstracted languages.

sentences.en: Type-Safe LLM Generations: Because Go is explicit, rigidly typed, and utilizes clean conventions (if err != nil), LLMs generate 90%+ more stable and execution-ready Go code compared to highly dynamic or deeply abstracted languages.
sentences.zh: 类型安全的 LLM 生成：由于 Go 是显式的、严格类型的，并且使用干净的约定（如果 err != nil），因此与高度动态或深度抽象的语言相比，LLM 生成的 Go 代码的稳定性和执行就绪性提高了 90% 以上。

blocks.html_en: • Motion B — The MCP Sidecar: The out-of-the-box local daemon utility used by individual contributors to instantly restrict cloud API billing thresholds within active IDE spaces. Register the MCP server with your coding client and start offloading immediately.

When your team scales from personal code execution to creating highly concurrent background enterprise automation pipelines (e.g., continuous CRM synchronizations or database migrations), import the Go-native SDK to deploy lightweight, crash-proof microservices.

blocks.html_en: 🆕 v1.0.0 Highlights

sentences.en: 🆕 v1.0.0 Highlights

blocks.html_en: • Structured Content-Aware Compaction Engine — New internal/compactor/ package replaces the older configurable CompactionLevel system. Tool outputs are now compacted using deterministic, content-type-aware strategies: code skeleton extraction (AST/regex-based, never LLM-compressed), JSON pruning, and log/text line truncation. Only the model's own reasoning text is LLM-compressed via the 1B router model. Compaction triggers every 3 steps as an architectural constant.

sentences.en: Structured Content-Aware Compaction Engine — New internal/compactor/ package replaces the older configurable CompactionLevel system.
sentences.zh: 结构化内容感知压缩引擎 - 新的内部/压缩器/包取代了旧的可配置 CompactionLevel 系统。

sentences.en: Tool outputs are now compacted using deterministic, content-type-aware strategies: code skeleton extraction (AST/regex-based, never LLM-compressed), JSON pruning, and log/text line truncation.
sentences.zh: 现在使用确定性、内容类型感知策略来压缩工具输出：代码骨架提取（基于 AST/正则表达式，从不 LLM 压缩）、JSON 修剪和日志/文本行截断。

sentences.en: Compaction triggers every 3 steps as an architectural constant.
sentences.zh: 作为架构常数，压缩每 3 个步骤触发一次。

blocks.html_en: • Goal-Directed File Compaction — When probe nodes read large files (>100 lines), the read_file tool automatically compresses output against the probe's goal using the router model. Files ≤100 lines are returned raw. Non-probe callers are unaffected. Falls back to deterministic truncation on router errors.

sentences.en: Goal-Directed File Compaction — When probe nodes read large files (>100 lines), the read_file tool automatically compresses output against the probe's goal using the router model.

blocks.html_en: • Worker Sidecar Synthesis — Terminal synthesis now routes through WorkerInference (64K context worker model) for superior content generation quality, while the router sidecar handles step-level tool decisions.

blocks.html_en: • Default Model Upgrade — Default worker model upgraded to Agents-A1-4B (Q4_K_M quantization) for improved agentic task performance.

blocks.html_en: • AST-Based Symbol Extraction & Anchor Verification — Pure-Go tree-sitter integration parses every file read during Probe Thought Chains, building a deterministic Symbol Index across 12 languages. A post-synthesis Anchor Check detects hallucinated type names and triggers targeted corrections, eliminating a 67% hallucination rate observed in docgen benchmarks.

sentences.zh: 基于 AST 的符号提取和锚验证 - Pure-Go 树守护者集成解析探测思想链期间读取的每个文件，构建跨 12 种语言的确定性符号索引。

blocks.html_en: • Directory Preloading — Probe Nodes pre-load source context (AST-extracted symbols for Go, raw content for Markdown/text) from target directories before exploration begins, eliminating file discovery gaps caused by local model routing failures.

content_html_zh:
TZRO：本地人工智能任务卸载器

保留云用于战略。 将执行卸载到本地计算。 将您的代理 API 令牌账单削减 90% 以上。

传统的编码助手和 CLI 代理循环（如 Claude Code、Cursor 或 VS Code Copilot）很容易出现“Token-Maxing”。 每次代理递归扫描您的目录、解析抽象语法树 (AST) 或格式化大量数据集时，它都会将原始代码库上下文重新提交到昂贵的云 API。 这会导致成本线性上升，单个活跃开发人员工作区的 API 费用达到每天 50 至 150 美元。

TZRO.ai 修复了代理开发的经济问题。 通过利用开放标准模型上下文协议 (MCP)，TZRO 透明地位于您最喜欢的编码客户端之下。 您的云前沿模型（例如，Claude 3.5 Sonnet）只处理一次高级策略规划，将指令编译成抽象执行图。 然后，它以零边际成本动态地将所有令牌密集型文件操作、字符串转换和数据洗牌委托给 TZRO 的轻量级、硬件固定的本地引擎，运行优化的本地模型。

⚡ 快速入门

在你的终端中运行：

curl -fsSL https://get.tzro.ai | sh

安装程序会检测您的平台，如果 Go 可用，则从源代码构建（或获取预编译的发行二进制文件），下载默认的 GGUF 模型，并为支持的 AI 编辑器（Claude Desktop、Cursor、Gemini CLI）提供 MCP 配置。

🛠️ 动态客户端委托架构

TZRO 依赖于认知调度和本地执行的严格解耦。

                  DYNAMIC CLIENT-SIDE DELEGATION FLOW

   +-----------------------+                    +-----------------------+
   |   MCP Client (Cloud)  |                    |   TZRO Server (Local) |
   |  (e.g., Claude Code)  |                    | (Task Offloader / OS) |
   +-----------------------+                    +-----------------------+
               |                                            |
               | ---- (1) Initialization Handshake -------->|
               | <--- (2) Exposes 15 MCP tools -------------|
               |                                            |
               |   =====================================    |
               |   User requests a token-heavy task:        |
               |   "Document this entire 100MB repository"  |
               |   =====================================    |
               |                                            |
               | ---- (3) Calls "tzro_run" ---------------->| (Delegates execution)
               |          with compiled task steps          |
               |                                            | (Kahn DAG compilation)
               |                                            | (GBNF logit constraints)
               |                                            | (5-Layer Compaction)
               |                                            | (SQLite persistence)
               |                                            |
               | <--- (4) Returns clean Markdown summary ---| (Context footprint < 1KB)
               |                                            |
  • Kahn 图形引擎：Go 引擎摄取客户端的有效负载，通过抽象语法树 (AST) 映射文件依赖关系，并应用 Kahn 的拓扑排序算法将操作编译为并发、可并行的有向无环图 (DAG)。
  • GBNF Logit 约束：小型局部模型经常会产生幻觉格式。 TZRO 在执行时将巴科斯-诺尔范式 (GBNF) 语法直接注入本地模型的 token 解码 logits，从数学上保证 JSON 或结构性降价输出的语法失败率为 0%。
  • 5 层压缩管道：为了防止本地上下文淹没，多对象响应在结构上剥离了二进制足迹，转换为标头映射的表格 TSV 格式（原始令牌计数节省 65% 到 85%），并展平为键值对。 如果数据仍然超出上下文预算，则会将其移至内部磁盘缓存，本地模型将在其中通过事务 SQLite 表按顺序查询数据。

有关内部子系统、编译流程、神经边缘遍历、上下文压缩管道和 Go SDK 挂钩的综合指南，请参阅架构指南。

💎 Go-Native 与 Python 框架的优势

TZRO.ai 避免了传统的、以研究为中心的 Python 框架典型的繁重的运行时层和动态类型错误。 通过严格在系统级 Go 上构建：

  • 超低资源占用：以 <30MB 空闲内存运行，启动时间 <10ms。 在繁重的处理扫描过程中，它不会旋转风扇或耗尽电池。
  • 零依赖管理：完全编译成一个独立的静态二进制文件。 无需管理虚拟环境、破坏性软件包升级或脆弱的锁定文件。
  • 类型安全的 LLM 生成：由于 Go 是显式的、严格类型的，并且使用干净的约定（如果 err != nil），因此与高度动态或深度抽象的语言相比，LLM 生成的 Go 代码的稳定性和执行就绪性提高了 90% 以上。

📈 现实世界的性能和成本矩阵

功能基准 Python 框架 TypeScript 框架 TZRO.ai（转到核心）
每个文档循环的平均成本 $15–$45（取决于云） $15–$35（取决于云） <0.20 美元（代币减少 99%）
空闲内存开销 150MB+ RAM 80MB+ RAM <30MB RAM（减少 75%）
冷启动时间 200ms–500ms 50ms–100ms <10ms（即时启动）
状态耐久性模型 专有平台（付费） 无服务器/云依赖 SQLite 检查点表（本地/免费）
输出结构安全 事后验证解析 运行时模式检查 Logit 级 GBNF 约束

🎛️ 双运动集成：SDK 框架与 MCP Sidecar

TZRO 支持两种操作集成工作流程：

  • Motion B — MCP Sidecar：个人贡献者使用的开箱即用的本地守护程序实用程序，可立即限制活动 IDE 空间内的云 API 计费阈值。 向您的编码客户端注册 MCP 服务器并立即开始卸载。
  • Motion A — SDK 框架：面向工程架构师的强大系统框架。 当您的团队从个人代码执行扩展到创建高度并发的后台企业自动化管道（例如，持续的 CRM 同步或数据库迁移）时，请导入 Go-native SDK 来部署轻量级、防崩溃的微服务。

🎛️ MCP 服务器集成

要将 tzro 作为 MCP 服务器与 Claude Desktop、Cursor、Gemini CLI 或 Google Antigravity 集成：

1. 构建二进制文件

go build -o bin/tzro-mcp ./cmd/tzro-mcp

2. 在客户端配置中注册

克劳德桌面：

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tzro": {
      "command": "/absolute/path/to/tzro/bin/tzro-mcp",
      "args": [],
      "env": { "PORT": "8080" }
    }
  }
}

光标：添加指向 /absolute/path/to/tzro/bin/tzro-mcp 的新命令类型 MCP 服务器。

Gemini CLI (~/.gemini/mcp_config.json):

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tzro": {
      "command": "/absolute/path/to/.tzro/bin/tzro-mcp",
      "args": []
    }
  }
}

Google Antigravity：将服务器配置添加到活动工作区中的 .agents/mcp_config.json，定义必要的环境参数，例如 TZRO_DIR。

3. 通过握手测试验证

手动运行 ./bin/tzro-mcp 并粘贴此初始化 JSON-RPC 块：

{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "initialize",
  "params": {
    "protocolVersion": "2024-11-05",
    "capabilities": {},
    "clientInfo": { "name": "test-client", "version": "1.0.0" }
  }
}

4. 保护 Stdio 管道

标准输入和输出严格保留用于 JSON-RPC 消息帧。 所有调试日志记录和运行时警告都会重定向到 stderr。 切勿在自定义工具、中间件或扩展中打印到标准输出。

有关更多详细信息，请参阅完整的 MCP 设置指南。

📡 MCP 工具界面 — 15 个工具

tzro 将其操作系统功能公开为 stdio 上的一组精简的 15 个 MCP 工具，分为三层：

第 1 层：核心执行（高频）

Tool 目的
tzro_运行 根据自然语言提示规划、编译和执行持久的 DAG 工作流程
tzro_代码 通过本地LLM代码生成或更新单个文件（完整或差异模式）
tzro_状态 检查任务的执行状态、节点状态和结果
tzro_列表_任务 列出最近的任务，可以选择按状态过滤
tzro_简历 恢复暂停/中断的工作流程任务
tzro_工作流程 创建并执行预定义的 DAG 工作流程，绕过 LLM 规划器
tzro_重启 通过 syscall.Exec 就地守护进程重新执行重新启动
tzro_仪表板 检查仪表板规范状态并返回 HTTP 仪表板 URL
tzro_schedule 创建、列出、切换、删除或触发计划的 cron 工作流程

第 2 层：合并行动调度

Tool 目的
tzro_hook 管理人机交互批准挂钩（列出/批准）
tzro_模型 管理本地LLM模型（列表/集合）

第 3 层：通用 API 逃生舱口

Tool 目的
tzro_api 不太频繁操作的通用调度：completion、classification、compact、web_search、memory_query、memory_ingest、kg_neighborhood、kg_add_entity、rag_context、skills_list、skills_get、skills_relevant、skills_add、observer_events、observer_memories、activity_report、sentinel_alerts、sentinel_wake、configure_tools、apps_list、apps_install、apps_uninstall、 dashboard_regenerate、dashboard_spec — 或守护进程 HTTP 端点的代理

基础设施：客户端工具调度

这些工具支持 MCP 客户端工具协议，通常不由用户直接调用：

Tool 目的
tzro_register_client_tools 为规划引擎注册动态客户端工具定义
tzro_client_tool_list 列出待处理的客户端工具执行请求
tzro_client_tool_submit 提交执行结果以恢复暂停的工作流程

资源订阅

为了实现实时可观察性，MCP 服务器公开了两个用于推送通知的 URI 模板：

  • 任务输出：tzro://tasks/{taskId}/output{?format} - 任务的状态、指标和合并输出
  • 节点输出：tzro://tasks/{taskId}/nodes/{nodeId}/output{?format} — 特定节点的状态和输出

🆕 v1.0.0 亮点

  • 结构化内容感知压缩引擎 - 新的内部/压缩器/包取代了旧的可配置 CompactionLevel 系统。 现在使用确定性、内容类型感知策略来压缩工具输出：代码骨架提取（基于 AST/正则表达式，从不 LLM 压缩）、JSON 修剪和日志/文本行截断。 只有模型自己的推理文本通过 1B 路由器模型进行 LLM 压缩。 作为架构常数，压缩每 3 个步骤触发一次。
  • 目标导向的文件压缩 - 当探针节点读取大文件（>100 行）时，read_file 工具会使用路由器模型根据探针的目标自动压缩输出。 ≤100 行的文件将原始返回。 非探测调用者不受影响。 在路由器错误时回退到确定性截断。
  • Worker Sidecar 综合 - 终端综合现在通过 WorkerInference（64K 上下文工作模型）进行路由，以实现卓越的内容生成质量，而路由器 sidecar 则处理步骤级工具决策。
  • 默认模型升级 - 默认工作模型升级到 Agents-A1-4B（Q4_K_M 量化），以提高代理任务性能。
  • 基于 AST 的符号提取和锚验证 - Pure-Go 树守护者集成解析探测思想链期间读取的每个文件，构建跨 12 种语言的确定性符号索引。 综合后锚点检查可检测幻觉类型名称并触发有针对性的更正，消除 docgen 基准中观察到的 67% 幻觉率。
  • 目录预加载 - 探测节点在探索开始之前从目标目录预加载源上下文（Go 的 AST 提取符号、Markdown/文本的原始内容），从而消除因本地模型路由失败而导致的文件发现间隙。
  • Repo 映射和直接合成 - 基于确定性 AST 的代码库架构映射可以为不需要多步骤 Probe 探索的任务提供单次合成，完全绕过思想链。
  • .gitignore 感知目录操作 - 目录复制操作现在遵循 .gitignore 模式，防止意外包含构建工件和依赖关系树。
  • 网站 v2 — 重新设计的文档网站，集成了 GitHub、交互式架构卡和新的法律页面（隐私政策、服务条款）。

💻 AI 编码代理指南

如果您是 AI 编码助理、软件代理或在此存储库中执行任务的自动化机器人，则必须遵守以下开发人员指南：

1. 尊重本地 Wiki 架构

所有系统概念页面、历史错误诊断事后分析和工作流程图均保留在 docs/wiki/ 下。 每当您完成功能重构、诊断基准测试失败或实施设计转变时，您必须按时间顺序将其记录在 docs/wiki/log.md 中，在 docs/wiki/features/ 或 docs/wiki/bugs/ 中创建/更新相关文件，并更新 docs/wiki/index.md。

2. 遵守域命名法

始终在代码注释、架构和 UI 组件中使用标准术语。 切勿使用已弃用的 v1 名称。 在编写变量或文档之前，请参阅存储库根目录中的 CONTEXT.md 以获取完整的术语表列表。

3. 验证和测试姿势

所有新导出的 Go 函数、编译过程或工具注册都需要在各自的包中进行相应的测试。 运行测试（去测试./...） 和代码格式化（go fmt ./...） 在提出更改建议之前。

4. 持久执行委托（卸载策略）

当执行任何不明确需要前沿模型推理的任务时（例如代码生成、复杂的架构设计判断或交互式人类对话），编码代理必须通过 tzro_run 或 tzro CLI 将执行委托给本地 tzro 引擎。 有关特定触发器和等待协议，请参阅 AGENTS.md 和 docs/ARCHITECTURE.md 中的卸载策略。
